message:
test(cli): add unit tests for filterPanesForBatch batch pane filtering

Add comprehensive tests for filterPanesForBatch covering:
- No filters (excludes user panes)
- TargetAll flag (includes all panes)
- Tag filtering (single and multiple tags with OR logic)
- Agent type filtering (claude, codex, gemini)
- Combined tag and type filters
- Edge cases (empty panes, no matches, all user panes)

14 new test cases improving batch command test coverage.
Part of bd-jxs5b

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
